name: Insect Island
description:
CW: Insects, oviposition, urethral insertion, eggs, cnc, bondage, vore.


After rough turbulence your private plane crash lands on a dersert island. Your pilot is nowhere to be seen, nor most of the complimentary supplies that you brought along. 


Sandy beaches stretch as far as you can see, and just inland is dense jungle. Everything seems larger, froms trees to ground folliage. All forms of plant life seem to have grown exponentially, this goes for the island's chitinous inhabitants aswell.


***Toned down the amount of insects attempting to interact with characters at a time and a slight grace period if someone manages to slip away.***
creator: Tomagaki
